title: premna scandens
intro: Premna scandens, also known as the climbing premna or climbing mist flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Premna scandens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. Premna scandens is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers of the plant.
